notes: Carey LoRA selection and caption dice now work on localhost too when paired with gary4local macOS v0.1.6.
The Carey UI now refreshes local LoRA availability while the service is running, so adapters added or removed in gary4local show up without a tab switch.
Complete and cover continue to support LoRAs on the remote backend as well.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
